uplink.description: long metering frame (0x09) — full instantaneous block: energy + active/apparent power, RMS voltage/current, derived 50 Hz
uplink._note: In-bounds synthetic long frame; expected.data derived by running reference/upstream-codec.js (parseMetering long path) and mapping voltage dV/10->V, current mA/1000->A, period->frequency 1/(period/1e6).

uplink.description: long metering frame with exporting (negative) active/reactive power and ~49.9 Hz line
uplink._note: Two's-complement negative active/reactive power; expected.data derived from reference/upstream-codec.js parseMetering and mapped to vocabulary units.

uplink.description: short metering frame (0x09, 21 bytes) — energy totals + activation only, no instantaneous channels
uplink._note: Short metering frame (<=21 bytes): upstream parseMetering short path returns date/activeEnergy/reactiveEnergy/apparentEnergy/activation only. Emits metering.energy.total plus extras.

uplink.description: unsupported frame id (0x0A IO frame) is rejected
uplink._note: Only the metering frame (0x09) carries calibrated power-meter quantities; other frame ids (IO/digital/time-sync) are rejected.

uplink.description: truncated metering frame (id 0x09 but too short for the short form)
uplink._note: A 0x09 frame shorter than 21 bytes cannot contain the energy block; rejected as truncated.
